# GamePulse

> Gaming industry business intelligence. AI-curated coverage of acquisitions, earnings, funding, layoffs, and market shifts across the gaming industry. Updated three times daily.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: /
- Story pages: /story/[id] — individual news articles with analysis
- Stock pages: /stocks/[ticker] — gaming company stock data, charts, and related news
- About: /about — editorial mission and methodology
- Dashboard: /dashboard — internal analytics (not for indexing)

## Content Types

- **News Articles**: Business-focused gaming industry stories sourced from GamesIndustry.biz, Game Developer, Kotaku, and other outlets. Each article includes a headline, summary, source attribution, publication date, and editorial analysis.
- **Stock Data**: Real-time pricing, key statistics, company profiles, and interactive charts for 12 publicly traded gaming companies including Nintendo, Sony, Microsoft, EA, Take-Two, Roblox, Unity, and others.
- **Market Analysis**: AI-generated commentary on gaming business trends posted to X/Twitter.

## Topics Covered

Gaming M&A, earnings reports, studio layoffs, funding rounds, hardware launches, subscription services, antitrust regulation, AI in game development, platform economics, live service strategy.

## Publisher

GamePulse is an automated news intelligence platform. Stories are sourced from established gaming industry publications and analyzed using AI. All original reporting belongs to the cited source publications.
